title: Mods MC
description: This Mod Pack improves "vanilla" Minecraft. Improves Fps, Quality of life Features, Easy to Use. Only one click.
body:
# Mods MC
## Why Mods MC?
This is an ModPack that **improves Minecraft performace** and **adds quality of life features!** Easy to use and install! Have fun with Minecraft!

## How to install?
You can **install any modpack** using **modrinth launcher**.

You can **customize easily** and there is no limit to it.

## Features?
1. **Improves Performance**!
2. Adds **World Map** and **Mini Map**!
3. **Easy** to use and install!
4. **Fixes** annoying **minecraft features/lack of features!**
5. **Customizable**!

And much **more!**
